name: dichvucong-support
displayDescription: AI-powered Vietnamese public services assistant that helps citizens navigate government service procedures with natural language Q&A. Needed because Vietnamese public service procedures are complex and documentation is scattered. Features GPT-4.1-mini chat, Whisper speech-to-text, and OpenAI TTS for accessibility. Contains 2 parts: React + MUI frontend with CopilotKit AI chat, and Express.js backend with Redis sessions and PostgreSQL via Prisma. Used by Vietnamese citizens needing guidance on government services. Monorepo managed with pnpm workspaces.
